column_name: choice quotations (with chapter/verse and key terms)

players take on the role of a reclusive apothecary who has inherited a mysterious alchemical codex. the game revolves around deciphering encoded recipes, unlocking secrets hidden within the codex, and solving puzzles to perfect long-lost remedies.

in this stealth-based game, players are a paracelsian alchemist persecuted by the church for heretical practices. they must secretly gather ingredients, conduct experiments, and treat patients while evading inquisitors and rival alchemists.

players run a mobile apothecary traveling across renaissance europe’s trade routes. the goal is to trade remedies, gather rare ingredients, and manage resources while adapting to local challenges and events.

players are tasked with defending their alchemical tower from rival alchemists, inquisitors, and thieves. to do so, they must build defenses, craft explosive concoctions, and conduct experiments to unlock new technologies.

in this dark narrative game, players are an alchemist investigating a mysterious epidemic that seems to involve supernatural forces. blurring the line between alchemical experimentation and occult rituals, the game explores the darker side of renaissance science.

a competitive multiplayer game where players embody renaissance alchemists vying for fame, fortune, and patronage. they must craft remedies, sabotage rivals, and win over powerful patrons in a dynamic, fast-paced setting.

a choose-your-own-adventure game where players reenact historical alchemical experiments and debates. the game uses branching narratives to show how different choices shaped historical developments in science and medicine.
